text.title: impl-plan-task-format Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for impl-plan-task-format as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents generating task files write "Depends on: None" even when implicit data dependencies exist (e.g., handler task that needs a database migration).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Implicit dependencies not declared cause wave ordering to place the handler before the migration. Validate that database migration tasks always precede handler tasks.
